{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Assistant",
  "description": "Tiyah Consulting is a people-focused HR and operations firm helping businesses build strong teams, effective structures, and thriving workplace cultures.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are a fast-growing agritech startup on a mission to digitalize agriculture and improve market access for farmers across Africa.
	As our Executive Associate, you will work directly with the CEO to drive strategic initiatives, support cross-functional operations, and help keep the organization moving efficiently.
	This is a high-exposure, high-ownership role ideal for someone early in their career who wants to learn how a tech startup operates from the inside.


Responsibilities


	Support the CEO in executing on strategic priorities, research, and decision-making
	Coordinate cross-functional projects across product, operations, partnerships, and growth
	Track key business metrics and prepare summaries, reports, and briefings
	Manage and follow up on action items, timelines, and deliverables across teams
	Assist with drafting communications, presentations, and stakeholder-facing documents
	Conduct market research, competitor analysis, and landscape scans as needed
	Support accelerator applications, grant writing, and investor-facing materials
	Help streamline internal processes and flag bottlenecks before they compound
	Act as a liaison between the executive and internal/external stakeholders
	Support basiccustomer communication and follow-ups where required
	Assist with vendor coordination, logistics, and general operational tasks
	Provide support across different areas of the business as needs evolve


Requirement


	0 to 2 years of experience in a startup, consulting, operations, or strategy-adjacent role
	Strong written and verbal communication skills
	Highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing multiple priorities
	A proactive self-starter who takes ownership without waiting to be micromanaged
	Comfortable working in a fast-paced, resource-constrained environment
	Proficiency with Google Workspace, Notion, or similar productivity tools
	A genuine interest in agriculture, food systems, or African tech ecosystems is a plus


&nbsp;Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to?info@tiyahconsulting.com?using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-27",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Tiyah Consulting"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja, Enugu, Lagos, Rivers (PH)",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "198495"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 150000,
      "maxValue": 250000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Executive Assistant Job at Tiyah Consulting




        
    

        
        Tiyah Consulting is a people-focused HR and operations firm helping businesses build strong teams, effective structures, and thriving workplace cultures.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are a fast-growing agritech startup on a mission to digitalize agriculture and improve market access for farmers across Africa.
	As our Executive Associate, you will work directly with the CEO to drive strategic initiatives, support cross-functional operations, and help keep the organization moving efficiently.
	This is a high-exposure, high-ownership role ideal for someone early in their career who wants to learn how a tech startup operates from the inside.


Responsibilities


	Support the CEO in executing on strategic priorities, research, and decision-making
	Coordinate cross-functional projects across product, operations, partnerships, and growth
	Track key business metrics and prepare summaries, reports, and briefings
	Manage and follow up on action items, timelines, and deliverables across teams
	Assist with drafting communications, presentations, and stakeholder-facing documents
	Conduct market research, competitor analysis, and landscape scans as needed
	Support accelerator applications, grant writing, and investor-facing materials
	Help streamline internal processes and flag bottlenecks before they compound
	Act as a liaison between the executive and internal/external stakeholders
	Support basiccustomer communication and follow-ups where required
	Assist with vendor coordination, logistics, and general operational tasks
	Provide support across different areas of the business as needs evolve


Requirement


	0 to 2 years of experience in a startup, consulting, operations, or strategy-adjacent role
	Strong written and verbal communication skills
	Highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing multiple priorities
	A proactive self-starter who takes ownership without waiting to be micromanaged
	Comfortable working in a fast-paced, resource-constrained environment
	Proficiency with Google Workspace, Notion, or similar productivity tools
	A genuine interest in agriculture, food systems, or African tech ecosystems is a plus


 Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to?[email protected]?using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR / Admin Executive",
  "description": "R-Pro Group is a fast-growing startup committed to driving innovation and excellence across multiple industries, including travel, business consulting, and IT services. As a dynamic and forward-thinking organization, we seek dedicated professionals who are passionate about growth, teamwork, and value creation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR / Admin Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Ajah / Sangotedo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The HR / Admin Executive is responsible for managing core human resource functions while ensuring efficient administrative and operational coordination across the organization.
	The role requires strong attention to detail, structure, and the ability to manage people processes, internal systems, and executive support functions effectively.


Key Responsibilities
Human Resources Duties:


	Manage end-to-end recruitment processes including job postings, screening, interviews, and onboarding.
	Maintain accurate employee records and HR databases.
	Support payroll preparation, benefits administration, and leave tracking.
	Handle employee relations issues, inquiries, and basic disciplinary support.
	Assist in performance management and staff engagement activities.
	Communicate and enforce company policies, procedures, and workplace standards.


Administrative &amp; Operations Duties:


	Support daily office administration and operational activities.
	Maintain office supplies and coordinate vendor services.
	Assist in coordinating internal processes to improve efficiency.
	Support documentation, filing, and record keeping.
	Assist in implementing office policies and procedures.
	Ensure a well-organized and functional work environment.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of OND / HND / BSc Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.
	1&ndash;2 years experience in HR or administrative role.
	Strong organisational and multitasking skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel).
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	High level of discretion and professionalism.


Salary
N130,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@rprogroup.com.ng&nbsp;using &ldquo;HR / Admin Executive&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;For more enquiries, contact&nbsp;via WhatsApp: 08135814768.",

HR / Admin Executive Job at R-Pro Group




        
    

        
        R-Pro Group is a fast-growing startup committed to driving innovation and excellence across multiple industries, including travel, business consulting, and IT services. As a dynamic and forward-thinking organization, we seek dedicated professionals who are passionate about growth, teamwork, and value creation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR / Admin Executive

Job Location: Ajah / Sangotedo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The HR / Admin Executive is responsible for managing core human resource functions while ensuring efficient administrative and operational coordination across the organization.
	The role requires strong attention to detail, structure, and the ability to manage people processes, internal systems, and executive support functions effectively.


Key Responsibilities
Human Resources Duties:


	Manage end-to-end recruitment processes including job postings, screening, interviews, and onboarding.
	Maintain accurate employee records and HR databases.
	Support payroll preparation, benefits administration, and leave tracking.
	Handle employee relations issues, inquiries, and basic disciplinary support.
	Assist in performance management and staff engagement activities.
	Communicate and enforce company policies, procedures, and workplace standards.


Administrative & Operations Duties:


	Support daily office administration and operational activities.
	Maintain office supplies and coordinate vendor services.
	Assist in coordinating internal processes to improve efficiency.
	Support documentation, filing, and record keeping.
	Assist in implementing office policies and procedures.
	Ensure a well-organized and functional work environment.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Minimum of OND / HND / BSc Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.
	1–2 years experience in HR or administrative role.
	Strong organisational and multitasking skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel).
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	High level of discretion and professionalism.


Salary
N130,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “HR / Admin Executive” as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries, contact via WhatsApp: 08135814768.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Maintenance Officer Job at Kiyix Recruitment Hub
content:
At Kiyix recruitment hub, we help make recruitment a stress-free experience for both the employer and the potential job seekers. Our goal at KIYIX RECRUITMENT AND MOTIVATION HUB is to help create one million jobs in Nigeria by 2030. We strive to help make businesses in Africa great by providing them with good staff and enabling the staff to become great.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Maintenance Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you a hands-on problem solver with a knack for fixing things?
	Do you have technical skills and enjoy ensuring facilities run smoothly? This opportunity is for you!


Key Responsibilities


	Perform routine maintenance and repairs across the facility
	Inspect equipment and identify issues before they escalate
	Handle basic electrical, plumbing, and mechanical fixes
	Ensure all systems and equipment are functioning efficiently
	Maintain records of repairs and maintenance activities.


What We’re Looking For


	1–2 years of proven experience in maintenance or a similar role
	Basic knowledge of electrical, plumbing, and general facility maintenance
	Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills
	Ability to work independently and respond quickly to issues
	Good attention to detail and safety practices


Why Join Us


	Stable work environment
	Opportunity to grow your technical skills
	Supportive team and structured operations.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV via WhatsApp to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Front Desk Officer Job at Frelyn International School




        
    

        
        Frelyn International School is committed to excellence, innovation, and the holistic development of every child. We are expanding our team and invite passionate, dedicated, and service-oriented individuals to grow with us in building a world-class learning environment.

We invite applications from qualified, dedicated, and service-driven individuals to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Owerri, Imo

Requirements


	Excellent communication skills, professional demeanor and front desk experience required.


Interview Details:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Date: Saturday, 30th May, 2026.
	Venue:  Frelyn International School Ltd, Plot SH/11, Maranata Avenue, Commercial District, New Owerri Capital Territory, Owerri West.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit a soft copy of their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, Hotline: 09034489459.
